text: Mini-tornado - shoots a small tornado, dealing good damage to entities
Tornado Capture - allows you to capture the nearest entity in a tornado and lift it up, thus dealing fall damage.
Tornado Flight - allows the tornado master to rise into the air using vortices.
Fleeting Twister: 15% chance to launch enemy into the air on attack.
Vortex Strike: 30% chance to gain "Dash II" for 10 sec (once per 40 sec).
